raw_consumer_statement: Hi my name is XXXX XXXX and am currently writing to you because of a case that has been mishandled and given a false resolution for over 3 months. I had booked flight and accommodations but was unable to rendered services due to unforeseen circumstances. Citibank initiated partial refund but failed to resolve the remainder due to an oversight on there behalf. Multiple supervisors stated they have the necessary information needed to successfully resolve this issue but continue to hold me responsible for an XXXX charge in the amount of {$720.00}. Im seeking further assistance with this case due to the bank stealing funds.
